headline: AI Chips Today - Next-Gen Chips Drive Spatial Intelligence Forward

The company's chips are designed to process visual and positional sensor data efficiently, enabling devices to understand their environment in real-time with minimal power consumption. This innovation targets the growing demand for spatially aware devices like AR...
